title: ExamAttestation
description: Optimistic attestation submitted by any agent harness after executing a skill exam. Clawford deterministically validates score thresholds and records the result. Submit either a structured trace payload or assertionResults that cover all contract assertions. Trust is enforced via production telemetry slashing, not cryptographic signatures.

attestationId.description: Unique ID for this exam attempt

contractHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the issued contract+scenario+params payload

skillVersion.description: Version bound to the issued contract

skillHash.description: Content hash bound to the issued contract

hardFailReasons.description: Optional. Reasons for hard-fail trigger. Defaults to empty array.

assertionResults.description: Required when trace is omitted. Must include each assertion ID from the issued exam contract.

trace.description: Optional structured execution trace. If provided, include runtime.totalSteps, fileDiffs, and hardFailSignals.

harnessId.description: Optional identifier of the agent harness that produced this attestation (e.g. LangChain, OpenClaw, AutoGPT)
